# Source Record

# Why It Matters
This page is the best upstream orientation source for how Obsidian frames vaults, notes, linking, plugins, themes, and the overall product surface.

# Key Excerpts
> Welcome to the official Obsidian Help site, where you can find tips and guides on how to use Obsidian.

> The page routes readers through Download and install Obsidian, Create a vault, Create your first note, Link notes, Import notes, and Sync your notes across devices.

> The page also highlights Core plugins, Community plugins, Themes, CSS snippets, Web Clipper, and Obsidian CLI.
